data.name: push-up inside leg kick
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 As you push back up, lift one leg off the ground and kick it out to the side, keeping it straight.
Step:4 Lower your leg back down and repeat the push-up, then switch to the other leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating leg kicks with each push-up repetition.

data.name: roller hip lat stretch
instructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with the roller positioned under your hips.
Step:2 Place your hands on the roller for support.
Step:3 Slowly roll the roller forward, extending your hips and stretching your glutes.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then roll back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: weighted sissy squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold a weight in front of your chest with both hands, or place a barbell across your upper back.
Step:3 Keeping your chest up and your core engaged, slowly lower your body down by bending at the knees and hips.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: runners stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted.
Step:3 Bend your right knee and lower your body down, keeping your left leg straight.
Step:4 Place your hands on your right thigh for support.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.

data.name: inverse leg curl (on pull-up cable machine)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle straps are at the lowest setting.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your legs extended and the ankle straps attached to your feet.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability.
Step:4 Bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstrings.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: resistance band seated hip abduction
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Step:3 Place your hands on the sides of the chair or bench for support.
Step:4 Engage your abductors (outer thigh muscles) and slowly push your knees apart, against the resistance of the band.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your knees back together.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled 45в° leg press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and footplate of the sled machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from your body by extending your legs, keeping your heels on the footplate.
Step:5 Continue pushing until your legs are almost fully extended, but without locking your knees.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the footplate back towards your body by bending your knees.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: weighted stretch lunge
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever lying leg curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and select the desired weight.
Step:2 Lie face down on the machine with your legs straight and your heels against the padded lever.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible without lifting your hips off the pad.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith bent knee good morning
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Place the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Step:5 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to raise your torso back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: barbell jump squat
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Once you reach the bottom of the squat, explode upwards by jumping off the ground.
Step:4 As you jump, extend your hips, knees, and ankles, pushing through your toes.
Step:5 Land softly back into the squat position and immediately repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: rocking frog stretch
instructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support.
Step:3 Slowly lean forward, shifting your weight onto your hands and extending your legs behind you.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your glutes as you push your hips back and up towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Hold this position for a few seconds, feeling a stretch in your glutes.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by bending your knees and lowering your hips back down.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: barbell one arm side deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Bend at the hips and lower the barbell towards the outside of your leg, keeping your arm straight and your chest up.
Step:4 Lower the barbell as far as you can while maintaining good form.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: exercise ball hip flexor stretch
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and kneel in front of it.
Step:2 Place your right foot on top of the stability ball, with your knee bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight.
Step:4 Lean forward, pushing your hips towards the stability ball, until you feel a stretch in your right hip flexor.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.

data.name: sled 45° leg press (side pov)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the sled machine so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle when your feet are on the footplate.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back flat against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push against the footplate to extend your legs, straightening them completely.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly bend your knees to lower the footplate back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: advanced dumbbell stiff leg deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing a slight bend in your knees. Focus on advanced movement.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then squeeze your glutes and push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled 45 degrees one leg press pointed
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footplate. Perform with pointed intensity.
Step:3 Place one foot on the footplate and extend your leg, pushing the sled away from you.
Step:4 Slowly bend your knee and lower the sled back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell pistol squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Lift your left foot off the ground and extend it forward, keeping it parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Slowly lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your right foot flat on the ground and your left leg extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

data.name: squat to overhead reach with twist
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 As you come up from the squat, raise your arms overhead and twist your torso to one side.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat the squat, this time twisting your torso to the opposite side.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides with each squat repetition.

data.name: dumbbell stiff leg deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then squeeze your glutes and push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: barbell hack squat
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell behind your legs, resting it on your upper thighs.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: weighted lunge with swing
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a weight in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 As you lunge forward, swing the weights forward and upward, keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position, swinging the weights back down.
Step:5 Repeat with your left foot and continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: barbell rear lunge v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Take a step backward with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot.
Step:3 Bend both knees to lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.

data.name: dumbbell one arm snatch
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body.
Step:4 Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the dumbbell upwards in a straight line.
Step:5 As the dumbbell reaches shoulder height, quickly rotate your hand and punch it overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:6 Catch the dumbbell overhead with a slight bend in your knees and hips.
Step:7 Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: bent knee lying twist (male)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend your arms out to the sides, perpendicular to your body.
Step:3 Keeping your knees together, slowly lower them to one side, aiming to touch the ground with your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then engage your core and slowly lift your knees back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
